title: Claude Mythos: The AI Model That Changed the Security Conversation in 2026
description: Claude Mythos marks a significant shift in AI development, moving beyond consumer chatbots toward specialized, autonomous models designed for complex cybersecurity reasoning and infrastructure analysis. By prioritizing deep system understanding and secure execution, this model represents a new category of enterprise-grade AI that is reshaping the future of software engineering and security.

title: What is Agentic AI? The Future of Autonomous Systems
description: Agentic AI represents a paradigm shift from passive, prompt-based models to autonomous systems capable of reasoning, planning, and executing complex tasks using specialized tools. This evolution transforms AI from a simple tool into a collaborative digital colleague, enabling significant productivity gains while necessitating new frameworks for human oversight and security.
